data.title: Spot gold touched $4,630 per ounce, while spot silver fell 3.00% on the day.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold touched $4,630 per ounce, down 0.44% on the day; spot silver fell 3.00% on the day, currently trading at $70.56 per ounce. The yield on the 10-year US Treasury note rose to 4.33%, the highest level since August of last year.

data.title: US media: The United States is sending three warships and thousands of soldiers to the Middle East.
data.description: U.S. officials revealed that the Pentagon is deploying three warships and thousands of additional Marines to the Middle East, while Trump insists he will not send U.S. troops into Iran. According to officials, approximately 2,200 to 2,500 Marines from the USS Boxer Amphibious Assault Group in California and the 11th Marine Expeditionary Force are en route to U.S. Central Command, which manages all U.S. military forces in the Middle East. This is the second large-scale deployment of Marines in the past week. Previously, the Pentagon had deployed the USS Tripoli, based in Japan, and the 31st Marine Squadron to the region. This report comes just one day after Trump stated that there were no plans to deploy U.S. ground troops to Iran. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Bitget Wallet integrates Cow Swap to expand on-chain liquidity.
data.description: Bitget Wallet announced its integration with the DEX aggregator Cow Swap to further enhance trade execution quality and liquidity access. This integration allows Bitget Wallet users to access the CoW Swap liquidity network, gaining more trade routing and execution options. Simultaneously, Bitget Wallet will run a dedicated CoW Swap Solver and provide liquidity based on its self-developed DEX trading API, enabling orders to be matched and optimally executed within the CoW Protocol auction mechanism. According to official data, the underlying infrastructure of CoW Swap, CoW Protocol, processed approximately $87 billion in transactions in 2025, more than double the amount in 2024.

data.title: Based on: The airdropped tokens will be directly distributed to users' Hyperliquid wallets on the day of TGE.
data.description: Based on an announcement on the X platform, to ensure a smooth experience and avoid claim congestion, the BASED airdrop tokens will be directly distributed to users' Hyperliquid wallets on TGE Day, without requiring manual claiming. Recipients can specify a preferred receiving wallet, but must set or update their receiving wallet before 12:00 UTC on March 25th. If no wallet is specified, the tokens will be sent to a default address.

data.title: Trump criticizes NATO as "cowards": unwilling to help open the Straits, then complains about high oil prices.
data.description: US President Trump recently posted a statement saying that without the US, NATO is a paper tiger! They are unwilling to join the fight to stop Iran. Now that the war has been militarily won and poses almost no danger to them, they complain about being forced to pay high oil prices, yet they are unwilling to help open the Strait of Hormuz. This is just a simple military operation, yet it is the sole reason for high oil prices. It's so easy for them, with almost no risk. Cowards, we will remember them.

data.title: Iran launched its 68th wave of strikes; no oil tankers carrying crude oil passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours.
data.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced today (March 20) that its navy and air force launched the 68th wave of Operation True Commitment-4. The announcement stated that the operation utilized Khorramshahr-4 missiles, Qader missiles, and dozens of attack drones to strike 25 targets in Haifa and Tel Aviv, Israel, as well as multiple US military bases in the Middle East. No oil tankers carrying crude oil passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the past 24 hours. (Jinshi)

data.title: Diesel Price Surge Raises Concerns Among U.S. Businesses
data.description: The recent rise in diesel prices has become a significant concern for U.S. businesses, overshadowing the already troubling increase in gasoline costs. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of diesel price hikes on various sectors, including transportation and logistics, which rely heavily on diesel fuel. The surge in diesel prices is attributed to several factors, including global supply chain disruptions and increased demand. As businesses grapple with these rising costs, the economic implications are becoming more pronounced, potentially affecting consumer prices and overall market stability. The situation underscores the need for strategic planning and adaptation by companies to mitigate the effects of fluctuating fuel prices.

data.title: Fintech Firms Shift Focus to Stablecoin Payment Blockchains
data.description: Stablecoin issuers and fintech companies are increasingly developing payment-focused blockchains to enhance the settlement layer for digital-dollar transfers. According to NS3.AI, this trend is exemplified by Stripe's significant $1.1 billion acquisition of Bridge, highlighting the scale of this strategic move. The article mentions Plasma, Circle's Arc, and Tempo as examples of firms transitioning from general-purpose blockchain infrastructure to stablecoin payment systems.

data.title: Crypto stocks opened lower across the board, with Circle down 3.4%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.26%, the S&P 500 fell 0.29%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.47%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally declined, with Circle down 3.4%, Coinbase down 0.48%, Robinhood down 1.16%, and Strategy down 0.39%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Gold and silver prices generally fell, cryptocurrency volatility decreased, and the BVIX fell 3.58% intraday.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,647.09 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.07%. Silver prices fell to $71.136 per ounce, a daily decrease of 2.25%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 54.34, a daily decrease of 3.58%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 78.56, a daily decrease of 0.20%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.35% to 6.90171. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.69% to 158.851. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.66% to 5,613.36 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.05% to 10,059.60 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 1.03% to 22,754.90 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.89% to $96.21 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 0.59% to $108.65 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Sees Slight Increase with Aptos Leading Gains
data.description: The CoinDesk 20 index experienced a modest rise of 0.2%, reaching 2039.71 since 4 p.m. ET on Thursday. According to NS3.AI, Aptos emerged as the leading gainer among the assets, with a notable increase of 6.3%. Out of the 20 assets tracked, fourteen recorded higher trading values.

data.title: Ledger Expands in U.S. with New York Office and CFO Appointment
data.description: Ledger has announced a significant expansion in the United States, marked by the opening of a new office in New York and the appointment of John Andrews, a former executive at Circle, as its chief financial officer. According to NS3.AI, the New York office will act as a central hub for Ledger Enterprise, facilitating the company's growth in the region. This expansion is anticipated to generate numerous job opportunities, contributing to the local economy.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Urges Senate to Pass Voting Rights Act
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has reiterated his call for the Senate to pass the Voting Rights Act. According to Jin10, Trump emphasized the importance of this legislation in ensuring fair and secure elections across the country. The act aims to address various voting-related issues and enhance the integrity of the electoral process. Trump's push for the bill comes amid ongoing debates over voting rights and election security in the United States. The President's statement underscores the administration's commitment to advancing this legislative priority.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 70,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.90% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2026, 13:32 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 70,000 USDT and is now trading at 69,987.726563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.90% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Packaged Food Industry Adapts to Modern Eating Trends
data.description:
The packaged food industry is undergoing significant changes to align with contemporary eating habits. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the shift towards healthier and more convenient options in the snack and packaged food sector. Companies are increasingly focusing on offering products that cater to consumer demands for nutritious and easy-to-prepare meals.

This transformation is driven by a growing awareness of health and wellness among consumers, prompting food manufacturers to innovate and diversify their product lines. The industry is witnessing a surge in demand for organic, plant-based, and low-calorie options, reflecting a broader trend towards healthier lifestyles.

As consumers become more health-conscious, companies are responding by reformulating existing products and introducing new ones that meet these preferences. This includes reducing sugar and sodium content, incorporating whole grains, and using natural ingredients.

The shift is not only about health but also convenience. Busy lifestyles are pushing consumers towards ready-to-eat and easy-to-cook meals, prompting companies to develop products that fit into fast-paced routines without compromising on nutrition.

Overall, the packaged food industry is evolving to meet the changing needs of consumers, focusing on health, convenience, and sustainability. This trend is expected to continue as companies strive to capture the growing market of health-conscious consumers.

data.title: Gen Z Embraces Paris Hilton and Britney Spears as Fashion Icons
data.description: Gen Z is turning to Paris Hilton and Britney Spears as fashion icons, sparking a resurgence in their popularity. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting how this trend has financially benefited Andrew Lutfy. The renewed interest in early 2000s fashion has led to increased demand for styles reminiscent of Hilton and Spears' peak fame era. This shift in fashion preferences among younger generations underscores the cyclical nature of trends and the enduring influence of past pop culture figures.

data.title: White House Efforts to Address Iran Conflict's Impact on Oil Markets
data.description:
The White House is actively working to manage the repercussions of the Iran conflict on global oil markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the administration's urgent measures to stabilize the situation. The ongoing tensions have led to significant disruptions in oil supply chains, prompting concerns over potential economic impacts worldwide.

Efforts are underway to mitigate the effects on energy prices and ensure market stability. The administration is coordinating with international partners to address the challenges posed by the conflict. These actions are part of a broader strategy to maintain economic equilibrium amid geopolitical uncertainties.

The situation remains fluid, with the White House closely monitoring developments and adjusting its approach as necessary. The focus is on minimizing disruptions and safeguarding the interests of consumers and businesses affected by the volatility in oil markets.

data.title: Grayscale transferred a total of 3,979 ETH to Coinbase, worth $8.52 million.
data.description: According to Arkham, Grayscale just transferred a total of 3,979 ETH, worth approximately $852, to a Coinbase Prime address through its Ethereum Mini Trust.

data.title: The International Energy Agency has issued a stark warning: the restoration of oil and gas supplies in the Gulf region could take six months.
data.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) issued a stern warning on Friday: the ongoing conflict involving Iran could trigger the largest supply disruption in the history of the global oil market, and the normal flow of oil and gas in the Gulf region could take up to six months to restore. IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol stated that policymakers and markets have underestimated the severity of the crisis, which could drive up energy prices and put pressure on global supply chains. The IEA emphasized that supply-side measures alone are insufficient to stabilize the market. In a detailed recommendation, the agency outlined a series of immediately implementable demand-side actions to alleviate consumer pressure and ensure energy security. Given the risk of prolonged supply disruptions, the agency's recommendations highlight the importance of immediate collective action—combining energy efficiency improvements, behavioral changes, and industrial adjustments—to address what it calls "the largest supply disruption in the history of the oil market." (Jinshi)

data.title: Central Banks Unlikely to Face Immediate Stagflation from Oil Shock
data.description: Central banks are not anticipating stagflation as an immediate consequence of the current oil shock, according to a report by Bloomberg posted on X. The analysis suggests that addressing stagflation, should it occur, would be challenging for policymakers. The report highlights the complexities involved in managing economic conditions that combine stagnant growth with inflation, emphasizing the potential difficulties central banks could face in such a scenario. The commentary underscores the importance of monitoring economic indicators closely to prevent adverse outcomes.
